articles.title: Industrial explosion sends multiple people to the hospital in East Providence
articles.description:
It remains unclear what caused the explosion at the Aspen Aerogels-run industrial plant.

The post Industrial explosion sends multiple people to the hospital in East Providence appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explosion at Aspen Aerogels industrial plant in East Providence injures multiple individuals.
Exact cause of the explosion remains under investigation as of April 9, 2026.
Local hospitals are treating the injured, raising safety concerns for nearby residents.
